title: helichrysum adenocarpum
intro: Helichrysum adenocarpum, also known as the yellow daisy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum adenocarpum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving wound healing, and supporting immune system function. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be applied topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
